articles.originalTitle: Kane passes Pelé WC goals total in England win
articles.originalSummary: Harry Kane has surpassed Pelé's World Cup goals total after scoring two goals against Congo DR on Wednesday to bring his goal tally to 13 and lead England to a 2-1 victory and a spot in the round of 16 at the World Cup.
